umm.digiquilt.model
Enum DefaultGrids

java.lang.Object
  java.lang.Enum<DefaultGrids>
      umm.digiquilt.model.DefaultGrids
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<DefaultGrids>
public enum DefaultGrids
extends Enum<DefaultGrids>

Static methods to get the predefined Grid used by the Select A Grid panel.

Version:
$Revision: 1.2 $
Author:
biatekjt, last changed by $Author: biatekjt $ on $Date: 2009-07-01 23:35:06 $

Nested Class Summary
static class DefaultGrids.GridDivision
          A wrapper class to encapsulate a set of Grids under a certain label.
 
Enum Constant Summary
FOUR
          Grid divisions for a 4x4 Block.
THREE
          Grid divisions for a 3x3 Block.
TWO
          Grid divisions for a 2x2 Block.

Enum Constant Detail

TWO

public static final DefaultGrids TWO
Grid divisions for a 2x2 Block.

THREE

public static final DefaultGrids THREE
Grid divisions for a 3x3 Block.

FOUR

public static final DefaultGrids FOUR
Grid divisions for a 4x4 Block.

Method Detail

values

public static DefaultGrids[] values()
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared. This method may be used to iterate over the constants as follows: 
for (DefaultGrids c : DefaultGrids.values())
    System.out.println(c);

Returns:
an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared

valueOf

public static DefaultGrids valueOf(String name)
Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this type. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)

Parameters:
name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
Returns:
the enum constant with the specified name
Throws:
IllegalArgumentException - if this enum type has no constant with the specified name
NullPointerException - if the argument is null

getDivisions

public DefaultGrids.GridDivision[] getDivisions()
Returns:
the divisions specified for this block size.

getBlockSize

public int getBlockSize()
Returns:
an int indicating what block size this DefaultGrids is meant for.
